name: Marvel
description: Superheroes, villains, and the Marvel Cinematic Universe

questions.q: Which 2008 film launched the Marvel Cinematic Universe?

source.notes: Directed by Jon Favreau. Robert Downey Jr. as Tony Stark. Released May 2008.

questions.q: What is the name of the fictional African nation ruled by the Black Panther?

source.notes: Home of vibranium. Ruled by King T'Challa. Film released 2018.

questions.q: What is the real name of the Hulk's alter ego?

source.notes: Dr. Robert Bruce Banner, a gamma radiation physicist.

questions.q: What is the name of Thor's legendary hammer?

source.notes: Forged in the heart of a dying star. Only the worthy can lift it.

questions.q: Spider-Man's alter ego Peter Parker lives in which New York City borough?

source.notes: Lives with Aunt May. The Queens neighborhood of Forest Hills.

questions.q: Captain America was frozen and 'slept' for roughly 70 years after which war?

source.notes: Crashed the Red Skull's plane into Arctic ice in 1945.

questions.q: What is the Thing's famous battle cry in the Fantastic Four?

source.notes: Ben Grimm, The Thing. 'Flame On!' is the Human Torch's catchphrase.

questions.q: What color is the Incredible Hulk?

source.notes: Originally grey in Hulk #1 (1962). Printing issues led to the switch to green.

questions.q: Which actor played the blind vigilante Matt Murdock in the 2003 film 'Daredevil'?

source.notes: Jennifer Garner played Elektra. They later married in real life.

questions.q: Who composed the score for the 2002 'Spider-Man' film (and also 'The Nightmare Before Christmas')?

source.notes: Elfman also scored Batman (1989) and the Men in Black films.

questions.q: Doctor Strange's Sanctum Sanctorum is located at what address in New York City?

source.notes: In Greenwich Village. Contains mystical artifacts and portals.

questions.q: Who is the shapeshifting mother of the X-Men member Nightcrawler?

source.notes: Raven Darkhölme. Nightcrawler's father is the demon Azazel.

questions.q: The Juggernaut is revealed to be the stepbrother of which X-Men character?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: changed 'half-brother' to 'stepbrother' to match canon — Cain Marko's father Kurt Marko married Charles Xavier's mother Sharon; they share no biological parent.

questions.q: What material coats Wolverine's skeleton and claws?

source.notes: Grafted via the Weapon X program. Nearly indestructible.

questions.q: What is the name of the Netflix/Marvel character played by Krysten Ritter, a super-strong private eye?

source.notes: Married name 'Cage.' Runs Alias Investigations. Series ran 2015-2019.

questions.q: Which 2018 film culminated in Thanos using the Infinity Gauntlet to erase half of all life?

source.notes: Directed by the Russo brothers. 'Snap' happened on Titan / Wakanda.

questions.q: How many Infinity Stones did Thanos collect?

source.notes: Space, Mind, Reality, Power, Time, Soul.

questions.q: In 'Guardians of the Galaxy,' what is the only phrase Groot can say?

source.notes: Voiced by Vin Diesel. Language varies in meaning by tone and context.

questions.q: Who founded the X-Men and runs the Xavier School for Gifted Youngsters?

source.notes: Telepath. School in Westchester, New York. Played by Patrick Stewart and James McAvoy on film.

questions.q: Which actor portrayed Tony Stark/Iron Man across the Marvel Cinematic Universe?

source.notes: Played Iron Man in 10 MCU films from 2008 to 2019.

questions.q: Which member of the Fantastic Four can ignite his body into flames?

source.notes: Sue's younger brother. The Human Torch. Battle cry: 'Flame On!'

questions.q: Which Marvel writer/editor, known for frequent cameos in MCU films, co-created Spider-Man, the X-Men, and many others?

source.notes: 1922-2018. Cameos appeared through 'Avengers: Endgame' (2019).
